website.name: Sofzsleep
website.context: A Singapore-focused sleep and mattress review site that helps readers compare mattresses, bedding, and sleep products.

goal: Create an AEO article that helps Singapore shoppers get a direct, citation-ready answer about when a customised mattress is worth considering and how to choose one confidently.
topic: Customised Mattress Singapore: When Custom Sizing and Firmness Make Sense
audience: Singapore shoppers who need a mattress that fits unusual bed frames, compact rooms, specific comfort needs, or family sleeping arrangements.
brandVoice: Practical, direct, helpful, and commercially aware without sounding salesy.
